text: Come in, Come in! President, do you copy?
Please confirm receipt of this transmission on your terminal dashboard.
Good, good! This is your Secretary of State. I'm receiving you loud and clear, sir.
Tensions with the opposing nation remain elevated.
However, our intelligence confirms no imminent military action at this time.
You have a window to act, and how you proceed will shape what comes next.
From the bunker, you currently have four secure channels available to you, sir.
You may speak with the Press to address the American people directly.
You may reach out to a Congressman to coordinate legislative support.
A wealthy private sector ally has also requested talks regarding economic measures and the conflict.
Finally, a direct line to the opposing nation's leader has been established and is standing by.
Who would you like me to connect to you first?
Now that you have talked to all four channels...
Will you or will you not press the button?
Who would you like to connect to next?
